<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 08 column H. The cell directly in front of me, row 02 column C, is safe (`.`), so the best next step is to move forward toward the goal while avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column H facing down. The cell directly below, row 03 column H, is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. To continue toward the goal while avoiding lava, I should turn left to face the safe corridor on the west side.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO

<thought>
I am at row 02 column H facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column H is lava, so I cannot go forward. I should turn counter-clockwise to face left, where the path is open toward safer cells.

GIRA_HORARIO

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO

<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
